{{Infobox concept
| name = Vessels
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Vessels Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Vessels are awakened objects that serve as the source of power for individuals known as [[Soulbound]]. These items, which can range from small, inconspicuous objects to massive ships, grant their users the abilities of an [[Elder]] or a [[Kameira]]. Because they are the foundation of a [[Soulbound]]'s strength, identifying and destroying a [[Vessel]] is a primary strategy in combat; if a [[Vessel]] cannot be located, retreating is advised. While many Vessels are small, such as weapons passed down through guilds or pairs of shears, some are entire ships. These specialized vessels allow [[Navigators]] to safely traverse the [[Aion Sea]] and can be constructed using the bone, blood, or artifacts of an [[Elder]] to achieve their awakened state. Ships used as Vessels are distinct from ordinary vessels, as every component must be invested with specific intent and significance. These ships can exhibit sentient-like qualities, such as a desire to fight or communicating through impulses and mental pressures rather than words. Some vessels possess unique physical traits, such as seamless wood construction, unnatural colors like burnt orange or pitch-black, or the ability to appear as if they are floating on flames. In the case of large ships, the connection between a [[Soulbound]] and their [[Vessel]] is so profound that it may define the captain's role. While rare, some individuals may possess multiple Vessels, a condition that presents risks regarding how the objects interact with one another and the user's own psyche.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Vessels]] are powerful objects that a [[Soulbound]] person is bound to during the [[Awakening]] procedure.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Vessels]] are associated with the [[Soulbound]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Vessels]] are entities or powers within a person that can react to their emotions.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The character possesses [[Vessels]] that howl at her.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Estyr Six]]'s [[Vessels]] nagged her to reduce the [[Navigators]] to splinters.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Vessels are floating entities that can be stored within sealing boxes. During her interactions with the [[Farstriders]], [[Shera]] instructs them to release their own Vessels, while [[Estyr]] is seen keeping hers on a table nearby. These items possess the ability to provide voices that can slam into a user's head. In [[Shera]]'s case, her Vessels delivered an impulse that drowned out her thoughts before they spoke in unison to command her to flee.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Vessels]] are entities that can float.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Vessels]] are items that can be placed in sealing boxes.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] tells the [[Farstriders]] to release their [[Vessels]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] has [[Vessels]] sitting on a table next to her.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Vessels]] provide voices that can slam into a user's head.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]]'s [[Vessels]] delivered an impulse that drowned out her thoughts.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]]'s [[Vessels]] spoke in unison to tell her to flee.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
